title: HIFORNY 76 PCS Drawing Set Sketching Kit,Sketch Pencils Art Supplies with Graphite,Charcoal,Blending Tools & Accessories,Portable Zippered Travel Case for Artists & Beginners
features: Complete Drawing Pencil Set: HIFORNY 76 PCS sketching and drawing kit includes 12 premium graphite pencils (8B, 6B, 5B, 4B, 3B, 2B, B, HB, 2H, 3H, 4H, 5H), 12 Colored Charcoal Pencils, 3 black charcoal pencils, 3 white charcoal pencils, 1 eraser pencil with brush,4 willow charcoal sticks, 3 graphite and 3 charcoal sticks. Each pencil is clearly labeled for easy selection—perfect for sketching, shading, blending, and layering.

Essential Drawing Tools: This versatile art set also includes 3 blending stumps,2 sketch scraper, 20 replacement heads, 1 white gel pen, 1 blender sponge, 1 pencil extender, 1 kneaded eraser, 1 vinyl eraser, 2 sharpeners, 1 sandpaper blockand 1 art knife—everything you need for detailed work and creative exploration. Great for both beginners and professional artists.

Unique 3-Color Sketchbook: 6 x 9", 100GSM, 50 Pages (30 pages white, 10 pages toned tan, 10 pages black) - Different colors of sketch paper are suitable for different styles of drawing, one sketchbook can meet your needs for different colors of sketch paper, no need to spend more money to buy different colors of sketchbooks.

Portable & Well-Organized：Comes in a durable zippered canvas case that neatly organizes all 76 items and keeps them easily accessible. Compact and lightweight—ideal for travel, art classes, or sketching outdoors, so your tools are always ready whenever inspiration strikes.

Artist Quality Drawing Pencil Set：Pre-sharpened, the lead core is smooth, durable, easy to sharpen and erase, ideal for the graphic designer, draft, and realistic sketches, perfect for details, shading, and layering, you can easily move from thick blending to fine, detailed illustrations to deep shading.

Perfect Gift for Art Lovers: Thoughtfully designed for artists, students, hobbyists, and beginners alike. Whether for personal use or as a creative gift for birthdays, holidays, or other occasions, this comprehensive drawing set supports a wide range of art projects—from casual sketches to detailed illustrations and professional artwork.
